overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a wizarding school setting, showing students in dark robes practicing spells in an outdoor wooden pavilion classroom. The stationary camera captures the semi-covered stone floor area surrounded by lush green forest as characters move about and cast magical spells.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor magic classroom under timber pavilion

another student raises wand to cast a spell near the center table

notable_agents.action: student casting spells with wand movements at the nearest table
professor or instructor standing near the back doorway observing the class

entered.detail: heavy timber beam structure with angled roof providing partial cover
light-colored stone tile flooring covering the pavilion ground
rustic wooden desks with books and papers scattered on surfaces
lush green forest with tall trees visible through open archways
large stone arch framing the view to the forest beyond

segments.scene_description: The scene depicts a stationary view of an outdoor magic classroom set within a timber pavilion. Students in dark wizarding robes practice spellcasting at wooden tables arranged on stone flooring, while a professor observes from near the back archway. The semi-covered structure opens to a lush green forest, with natural light filtering through the wooden beams as students cast spells with their wands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric view of an outdoor magic classroom that emphasizes the harmony between a structured learning environment and the surrounding wilderness. It begins within the shelter of a timber pavilion, where students in dark wizarding robes are gathered around wooden tables on a stone floor. As the camera captures the activity, the focus shifts from the students practicing their spellcasting to the professor observing from a nearby back archway. The scene then opens outward, drawing the eye past the wooden beams toward the lush green forest that envelops the structure. Finally, the composition settles on the interplay of natural light filtering through the pavilion, blending the interior academic space with the vibrant greenery of the outdoors.
